enrichment.summary: Kyle films a vlog from Boulder, Colorado, showing home improvement or painting work he completed the previous day. He mentions smoking weed/wax/shatter, having a small salad for breakfast, sleeping in, and plans to complete a project over two days.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: confident he can complete his project work that day
